lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Greetings, stranger. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: It's a cave filled with araxytes, a rare form of arachnid. I've been here researching them for some time.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: My niece, Nieve, is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I also look after this cave for people on assignments like that.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: My nephew, Steve, is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. I also look after this cave for people on assignments like that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Discovered anything interesting?

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Hmm... Not really.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: However, the araxytes here are rather venomous... and when I say venomous, I mean venomous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that really noteworthy?

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Well, I didn't think so by itself, but lots of other people seem to find it very interesting.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: For example, there were some particularly pale wanderers doing their own research in here. They didn't bother me though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Bye bye.

sections.title: Using a jar of venom on her

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this Jar, I think it's full of venom.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Oh wow, can I see it?.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: That is really fascinating. Thank you for sharing that with me.

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Next I'll need to find something a little more potent to progress my research...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep my eyes open!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Did you want to see the Jar again?

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: No that's quite alright, I've nothing else to learn from that particular sample. I need to find something else to progress my research...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Weave
lines.text: Bad! Don't touch these unless you have a Slayer task to kill them.
